texto: The greatest discovery is to find a hero within oneself that will choose life over death
autor: and fight for hope through despair to possess the will to live.
explicacao: Citação de and fight for hope through despair to possess the will to live. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “The greatest discovery is to find a hero within oneself that will choose life over death” articula reflexao, ellen-j-barrier, greatest em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e reflexao.
